stop_conditions: fixes have corresponding Fast/Medium Gate evidence
post_codex_review_gate.release_rule: Full Review must have no release-blocking P0/P1/P2 issues before tag/release.

obsolete_test_pruning.rule: Do not delete a test until the replacement canonical invariant and validation gate are named.
